summary: Independent re-verification of RED security bug fix: inter_agent.py correctly fails closed when company_id is missing. All 3 inter-agent functions reject calls without explicit company_id.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: _require_company_id() helper returns None if company_id is missing/empty (line 42-46)
VERIFIED: delegate_to_agent checks for None and returns error (line 128-133)
VERIFIED: escalate_to_hermes checks for None and returns error (line 215-220)
VERIFIED: ask_colleague checks for None and returns error (line 364-369)
VERIFIED: No 'or "default"' or 'or 'default'' fallback patterns exist in source code
VERIFIED: test_inter_agent_tools_require_company_id test validates all 3 functions reject missing company_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security bug fix for inter-agent company_id fallback independently verified. 10/10 tests pass. The fix is confirmed: _require_company_id() returns None for missing/empty company_id, and all 3 functions check for None and return ok=False with explicit error message.

security_verification.bug_description: inter_agent delegate_to_agent/ask_colleague/escalate_to_hermes must never fall back to company_id='default'
verification_method: Source code grep: No 'or "default"' or 'or 'default'' patterns found
Source code grep: No 'company_id = ... default' assignments found
Code review: _require_company_id() returns None if empty, all 3 functions check and fail closed
affected_functions: delegate_to_agent (line 128-133): returns ok=False with 'company_id is required for delegation; fallback to 'default' is disabled for security'
escalate_to_hermes (line 215-220): returns ok=False with 'company_id is required; fallback to 'default' is disabled for security'
ask_colleague (line 364-369): returns ok=False with 'company_id is required; fallback to 'default' is disabled for security'
